title: CACO COMMUNITY CAMPING - 211info
text: CAMBODIAN AMERICAN COMMUNITY OF OREGON CACO COMMUNITY CAMPING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a culturally specific camping experience and volunteer opportunities. Website Beaverton, OR 97075 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as Cambodian or Cambodian-American Hours: Camps are held during the summer season, registration opens in the spring Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: Age 13 and older: $30 per person Ages 0-12: free Parking: $10 per car DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Cambodian Community Volunteer Opportunities * Cambodian Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CAMBODIAN AMERICAN COMMUNITY OF OREGON
